case_title: ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC. VS. TIMOTHY RONEY ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT RONEY, TIMOTHY AN INDIVIDUAL

LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF TIMOTHY RONEY IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 28, 2018 AT 9:30 AM FOR DEFENDANT TIMOTHY RONEY TO PROVE SPOUSAL SUPPORT GARNISHMENT. THE CLERK TO SEND AN EMAIL TO DEFENDANT WITH A COPY TO PLAINTIFF RE: CONTINUANCE DATE. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M.GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, TORREANOM@AOL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/HK)

DISCOVERY 302, IS CONTINUED TO 5/11/18 @ 9 A.M. THE PAPERS FILED BY THE MOVING PARTY DO NOT SPECIFICALLY IDENTIFY THE SOURCES OF INCOME TO BE ATTACHED. THE INFORMATION REQUESTED SHALL CONFORM TO THAT ORDERED IN A SIMILAR PROCEEDING IN THIS COURT (SFSC NO. 548742 - BIRITE V. AGUILAR.) THE MOVING PARTY SHALL PROVIDE SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEFING WITH THIS INFORMATION BY 5/3/18. ANY OPPOSITION SHALL BE FILED BY 5/9/18.

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jun-28-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ryan Dahm, Esq. 415-989-4730 of Cook Collection Attorneys for Plaintiff Align Technology.
No other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF TIMOTHY RONEY.

Upheld. Granted.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jun-20-2018 Continued To Jun-28-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ryan Dahm, Esq. 415-989-4730 of Cook Collection Attorneys, PLC for Plaintiff Align Technology.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF TIMOTHY RONEY.

Continued to June 28, 2018 at 9:30 am for Defendant Timothy Roney to prove spousal support garnishment. The Clerk to send an email to Defendant with a copy to Plaintiff re: Continuance Date.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-21-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar May-11-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. Ryan L. Dahm of the Cook Collection Attorneys, Tel. No. 1-415-989-4730 appearing for the Plaintiff;
No other appearance on the matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC's Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order is granted. No opposition filed Order signed in open court. Judge Pro-tem: David Mcdonald; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Apr-27-2018 Continued To May-11-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance, The Court adopted it's tentative ruling; PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order is Continued to 5/11/18 @ 9 a.m. The papers filed by the moving party do not specifically identify the sources of income to be attached. The information requested shall conform to that ordered in a similar proceeding in this Court (SFSC No. 548742 - Birite v. Aguilar.) The moving party shall provide supplemental briefing with this information by 5/3/18. Any opposition shall be filed by 5/9/18.
